description: Inviter/admin response to a pending reissueWelcome request. Stores a fresh MLS Welcome for the recipient device and marks the reissue request as answered.

requestId.description: Identifier returned by the server-side reissue request record.

welcomeBlob.description: TLS-serialized MLS Welcome generated for the recipient device.

keyPackageHash.description: Optional hex-encoded SHA-256 hash of the recipient key package used to generate this Welcome.

stored.description: True when the Welcome was stored and the request was marked answered.

requestId.description: Echo of the answered reissue request identifier.

welcomeBlobId.description: Server identifier for the stored Welcome blob.

respondedAt.description: Server timestamp when the Welcome was stored.

errors.name: RequestNotFound
errors.description: No pending unanswered reissue request exists for requestId.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: Caller is not an active admin/inviter for the request conversation.

errors.name: InvalidWelcome
errors.description: Welcome bytes are missing or invalid.
